74829.subject: Onchain Assets Weekly: 6/19/26
74829.body:
Onchain Assets Weekly

Автор: Securitize


Автор: Securitize

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-61926-securitize-g23hc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Btnzcd2JkTd%2BmSYW%2BDFc4uA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=27wrqpdVAgask1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqlcsfgb~lm-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqlcsfgb-lm
  
This week’s highlights: Carlos Domingo named EY Entrepreneur of the Year; STAC Launches on Solana; Carlos Domingo joins The Wolf of All Streets; and Wall Street’s push into tokenized stocks. Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo Named EY Entrepreneur of the Year 2026 | CryptoBriefing Carlos Domingo, CEO & Co-Founder of Securitize, received EY’s 2026 Florida Entrepreneur of The Year award as Securitize reports over $4 billion in tokenized assets and more than 580,000 investor accounts. READ MORE Ethena Labs to Allocate $250M to Securitize's Tokenized AAA CLO Fund as It Deploys on Solana | The Block Ethena’s planned $250M allocation to Securitize’s STAC fund comes as the tokenized AAA CLO strategy launches on Solana, expanding onchain access to institutional-grade structured credit. READ MORE Bitcoin Just Got a $4 Trillion Catalyst - Carlos Domingo | The Wolf of All Streets Podcast From BlackRock’s first tokenized fund to NYSE’s 24/7 trading ambitions, Carlos Domingo shares how Securitize is positioning tokenization for broader institutional adoption. WATCH NOW Wall Street Wants to Cryptofy Your Stock | Bloomberg Putting stocks and other assets on the blockchain can make trading faster, smoother and available 24/7, says the technology’s boosters. READ MORE
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-61926-securitize-g23hc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Btnzcd2JkTd%2BmSYW%2BDFc4uA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=27wrqpdVAgask1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mqlcsfgb~lm-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqlcsfgb-lm
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Btnzcd2JkTd%2BmSYW%2BDFc4uA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=27wrqpdVAgask1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newslett

74827.subject: How to build an entire business using Claude?
74827.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/how-build-entire-business-using-claude-genai-works-kheme?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BCgrTykVNT5SqBlztQMygug%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0XYCHK6etGack1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mql684sg~3c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mql684sg-3c
  
Welcome back! Ever notice when a technology stops assisting people and starts becoming the system itself? That happened four times this week. PwC rebuilt finance around Claude, Anthropic made AI work instantly shareable, Allbirds reinvented itself as an AI infrastructure company, and a medical AI agent moved from diagnosis to action. In today's Atlas Newsletter: PwC rebuilt finance around Claude: Insurance underwriting dropped from 10 weeks to 10 days after redesigning the process around AI instead of adding AI to an old workflow.  Claude Code removes the communication tax: Artifacts turn AI sessions into live, shareable reports so teams spend less time explaining and more time shipping.  Allbirds quit shoes for AI infrastructure: A company once worth nearly $4B has reinvented itself as Smartbird, betting its future on GPU infrastructure instead of sneakers.  AI is moving from diagnosis to action: A new medical AI agent doesn't just recommend treatments. It orders tests, prescribes medications, schedules procedures and coordinates care.  PS: Want to collaborate with the biggest GTM engine and distribution moat for AI companies? You can feature your tool with us and reach millions. PwC built an entire business unit around Claude Pause for a second. PwC didn't only adopt Claude. It built a full AI business unit around it: The Office of the CFO, already live in production. At launch, the CEO of Anthropic Dario Amodei shared the number that matters: insurance underwriting went from 10 weeks to 10 days.  Same regulations. Same compliance. Same data. Different systems. That is the lesson. Most companies add AI on top of an old process.  PwC rebuilt the process around AI. That is why the result is 10 days and not 10 weeks. The partnership now extends across finance, healthcare and life sciences, using Claude Cowork, Claude Code and the Claude Developer Platform, powered by Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6. → In finance, that means liquidity forecasting, scenario modeling and capital markets intelligence. → In healthcare, it means utilization management, care coordination and revenue cycle. → In life sciences, it means target identification, regulatory submissions and manufacturing quality. PwC is also building industry-specific skills, connectors and plugins on top of Claude, with role-based oversight and human-in-the-loop controls from day one. This is not another AI

74824.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 19
74824.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-19-cryptobeholder-ndg3f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2Jw%2FW541Tu2UmlBJ6jYZYQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=09UBtq4vQPack1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mql4wypt~8w-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mql4wypt-8w
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-off dominates: Bitcoin's fourth straight drop and a record digital-credit selloff set a defensive tone, even as Franklin Templeton, Kalshi and US regulators push crypto's institutional and legal frontiers forward. 🔻 Bitcoin Slides Below $63K as Risk Assets Sell Off Bitcoin fell under $63,000 on Friday — its fourth straight daily decline — as a broad risk-off move erased the week's bounce in thin holiday trading. With oil down roughly 9% and the US-Iran deal easing the geopolitical premium, traders are now questioning whether this cycle delivers an altseason at all. Read full story → 🚨 Microsoft Warns of Crypto-Stealing Malware Spreading via USB Microsoft flagged newly discovered malware that hijacks crypto wallets and propagates through USB sticks. The worm hides inside shortcut files, harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard, and silently swaps in attacker-controlled addresses when it detects a transfer. More details → ⚖️ SEC and CFTC Open Public Comment on Perpetual Futures US regulators jointly opened a public consultation on how swaps and perpetual-futures products should be defined, just as the fight over crypto derivatives heats up. The move follows CME's threat to sue the CFTC over its approval of Kalshi's Bitcoin perpetual contracts, signaling existing rules may no longer fit the market. Read more → 🏦 Franklin Templeton Files Bitcoin DRIP ETFs That Reinvest Dividends Into BTC Franklin Templeton filed for two Bitcoin DRIP ETFs that automatically funnel stock dividends into Bitcoin, with a target effective date as early as September. The structure blends traditional dividend reinvestment with crypto exposure, deepening the bridge between conventional finance and BTC. See details → 📈 Kalshi in Early IPO Talks as Revenue Triples to $2B Prediction-market platform Kalshi is reportedly in early discussions with investment banks about a public listing after annualized revenue tripled to roughly $2 billion. The talks surface even as the firm's sports-related contracts draw mounting legal scrutiny. Read full story → 📉 Strive's Digital Credit Market Hit by Record Selloff Strive's digital-credit instruments STRC and SATA suffered a record selloff before partially rebounding, with CEO Matt Cole blaming forced selling by leveraged investors. He called it the most difficult day in

>>>>>>>>>> voľný a veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret
